name: @hover-dev/transform-source
description: Internal: source-attribution transforms (JSX / Vue SFC / Svelte / Astro) consumed by Hover's bundler integrations. Stamps host elements with data-hover-source="file:line:col" so the widget's Fix picker can point the agent at a precise file location. Not published to npm — each integration shim's tsup build inlines this package into its dist via noExternal.
author: Hyperyond
